name: Sezzle Inc.
business: Sezzle Inc. is a purpose-driven payments company that provides a digital shopping and payments platform offering consumers a flexible alternative to traditional credit through buy now, pay later products and paid subscription services. It primarily serves Gen Z and Millennial consumers and merchants ranging from small-to-medium sized businesses to enterprise merchants.

exposures.sentence: We have built a digital shopping and payments platform that provides consumers a flexible alternative to traditional credit.
The Sezzle Platform can be integrated into merchants websites via pre-built widgets for select e-commerce platforms or our direct Application Programming Interface.
We use AI/ML in various aspects of our operations, including fraud prevention, risk management, marketing and customer service.
